post.description:
User MUST have a DELIVERED order containing this product. One review per (product, user).
Starts in PENDING and requires admin approval to be visible in summaries.

patch.summary: Admin — restore a hidden/rejected review to APPROVED

get.summary: Product review summary (average, count, 1..5 breakdown — APPROVED only)

delete.summary: Delete product (cascades gallery + characteristics + variants + variant images; cleans Cloudinary)

patch.summary: Toggle a boolean flag (isFeatured / isRecommended / isTrending / isBestSeller / isNewArrival / isActive)
Replace a product's catalog assignments (sizes, colors, tags, labels, collections)
patch.description: Each provided array REPLACES that assignment. Omit an array to leave it unchanged.

post.summary: Upload / replace a product image slot (thumbnail, extra1, extra2, extra3)
Upload one or more gallery images (max 10, field "images")
Upload one or more variant images (max 10, field "images")

get.description: Same query params as GET /discounts. The URL productId is forced.

Same query params as GET /reviews. Supports status, rating, sortBy, sortOrder.
For the customer-facing storefront pass status=APPROVED.

get.summary: Rating summary for this product (average, total, 1..5 breakdown; APPROVED only)
List orders that contain this product
get.description: Admin / analytics. Same filters as GET /orders (status, paymentStatus, userId, from, to).

put.summary: Admin update — shipping/billing address and customer note
put.description:
Items, totals, coupon, and status are locked at placement. Only editable fields:
shippingAddress, billingAddress, customerNote. Shipping address changes are refused after the
order has shipped.

delete.summary: Soft-delete an order (hides from default listings)
delete.description:
Row is preserved for accounting. Restore with POST /orders/{id}/restore.
Default listings exclude soft-deleted orders.

patch.summary: Advance the order status (enforces the state machine)

post.summary: Cancel an order (only before shipment) — restores stock atomically

400.description: Percentage out of range / start after end

get.summary: Validate a coupon against a cart total (dry-run, no side effects)

400.description: Expired / inactive / minimum purchase not met / usage limit reached

post.summary: Compute a live checkout summary (dry-run, no writes)

400.description: Cart empty / item unavailable / stock issue / coupon invalid

post.summary: Place an order (atomic stock decrement + snapshot pricing)
post.description:
Recomputes the summary server-side. In a single transaction:
decrements variant stock (guarded so it never goes negative),
creates the Order + OrderItem snapshots, tracks coupon usage,
and clears the cart. Returns the new orderNumber.

get.description:
Paginated list. Supports search by name, filter by isActive / isFeatured / parentCategoryId,
and sort by createdAt / updatedAt / name.
Pass `parentCategoryId=null` to fetch only top-level categories.

parameters.name: parentCategoryId
parameters.description: A UUID, or the literal string "null" for top-level categories

post.description:
Creates a new category. Name must be unique (case-insensitive).
If parentCategoryId is provided, the parent must exist.
To attach an image, call POST /categories/{id}/image after creation.

delete.description: Fails if the category has sub-categories. Removes the Cloudinary image if present.

get.description:
Same query parameters as GET /products (page, limit, search, brandId, status, sortBy, sortOrder,
flag filters, etc.). The URL categoryId always wins over any categoryId in the query.

200.description: OK. Returns `{ mode: 'grouped', groups: [...] }` for root categories, or `{ mode: 'flat', items: [...], meta: {...} }` for subcategories.

post.summary: Upload or replace a category's image
post.description:
Uploads via the centralized Cloudinary service.
- Multer memory storage
- Max 5 MB
- Allowed formats: jpg, jpeg, png, webp (MIME validated)
- Applies quality=auto and fetch_format=auto transformations
- Stored under fashion-store/categories
- If the category already has an image, the previous asset is deleted from Cloudinary after the new one is stored.

post.summary: Add an item to the cart

400.description: Insufficient stock / inactive product or variant

put.summary: Update the quantity of a cart item

delete.summary: Remove an item from the cart

UpdateProductBody.description: At least one field. Image endpoints handle thumbnail/gallery.

UpdateCategoryBody.description: At least one field required. Image is NOT modifiable here — use POST /categories/{id}/image.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Fashion e-commerce products (thumbnail, gallery, characteristics, variants, flags)

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Cart → validate → discounts → coupon → shipping → tax → grand total → order
